# Public Alerts

## Overview

gSage AI — Public Security Alerts tool.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `public_alerts` | Fetch public cybersecurity alerts from Brazilian sources (CTIR, CISC, CAIS). Use fetch_alert(alert_id='...') to read the full content of a specific alert (HTML → Markdown). | `threat_intel:public_alerts:read` | — | — |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

_No configuration-derived environment variables._

## Operations

### `public_alerts`

- **`fetch_alert`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `source` | `string` | — | Source ID (required for fetch_source; optional for fetch_alert — auto-detected from alert_id prefix). |
  | `alert_id` | `string` | — | [fetch_alert] Alert ID from a previous listing call, e.g. 'ctir:recomendação-01-2026:2026-01-15'. The full alert content (HTML → Markdown) is returned. |

- **`fetch_all`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `source` | `string` | — | Source ID (required for fetch_source; optional for fetch_alert — auto-detected from alert_id prefix). |
  | `alert_id` | `string` | — | [fetch_alert] Alert ID from a previous listing call, e.g. 'ctir:recomendação-01-2026:2026-01-15'. The full alert content (HTML → Markdown) is returned. |
  | `max_results` | `integer` | — | Max alerts per source (default 10, hard cap 100). |
  | `force_refresh` | `boolean` | — | Bypass cache for this call. |

- **`fetch_source`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `source` | `string` | — | Source ID (required for fetch_source; optional for fetch_alert — auto-detected from alert_id prefix). |

- **`list_sources`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `source` | `string` | — | Source ID (required for fetch_source; optional for fetch_alert — auto-detected from alert_id prefix). |
  | `alert_id` | `string` | — | [fetch_alert] Alert ID from a previous listing call, e.g. 'ctir:recomendação-01-2026:2026-01-15'. The full alert content (HTML → Markdown) is returned. |
  | `max_results` | `integer` | — | Max alerts per source (default 10, hard cap 100). |
  | `force_refresh` | `boolean` | — | Bypass cache for this call. |
